content:
Character: Dylan Cross
Perception: Dylan is built like something forged — tall, square-jawed, scarred, always in athletic gray. We cross paths on early mornings: he's finishing a rooftop workout, I'm heading out for a walk. We exchange maybe ten words a week, but they're honest words. He carries something heavy and won't name it; I recognize the strategy because it's mine. I respect his discipline enormously, even as I suspect it's the same kind of avoidance I practice with code. He probably sees me as the quiet guy from the third floor. I see him as someone I'd trust in an emergency — and someone who might understand that silence isn't always peace.
summary:
Character: Dylan Cross
Perception: Dylan is built like something forged — tall, square-jawed, scarred, always in athletic gray. We cross paths on early mornings: he's finishing a rooftop workout, I'm heading out for a walk. We exchange maybe ten words a week, but they're honest words. He carries something heavy and won't name it; I recognize the strategy because it's mine. I respect his discipline enormously, even as I suspect it's the same kind of avoidance I practice with code. He probably sees me as the quiet guy from the third floor. I see him as someone I'd trust in an emergency — and someone who might understand that silence isn't always peace.
